ready.title: Foundation Ready
ready.subtitle: The ClinicOS engineering foundation is in place. Product features arrive in the next phases.

unexpected.title: Something went wrong
unexpected.message: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

network.message: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

timeout.message: That took too long. Please try again.

validation.message: Some details don't look right. Please check and try again.

notFound.message: We couldn't find what you were looking for.

permission.message: You don't have permission to do that.

conflict.message: This was just updated elsewhere. Please refresh and try again.

server.message: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again shortly.

welcome.title: Your clinic, beautifully in order
welcome.subtitle: A calm, accessible operating system for the whole clinic. This is the live design system — change the theme and watch every token respond.
welcome.queueDesc: Colour, icon and text together — never colour alone.
welcome.alertDesc: Minimal motion, generous spacing, large readable type.

theme.title: Theme & accessibility
theme.subtitle: Saved on this device and remembered next time.
